subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! Question the idols of the earth - namely, the divines of Iran - whether this Wronged One is, in their estimation, false [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا محمد از اصنام ارض یعنی علمای ایران سوال نما اینمظلوم بزعم شما کاذب و غیر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prophecy and fulfillment, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution
